announcements.headline: Extraordinary General Meeting Updates
announcements.body: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange that the shareholders of the Company in the Extraordinary General Meeting held on 27th June, 2013, by special resolution, approved the Modified Draft Rehabilitation Scheme incorporating Amalgamation between Bharat Heavy Plate and Vessels Limited, the wholly owned subsidiary of Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL) and BHEL, subject to the approval of the Board for Industrial and Financial Reconstruction (BIFR) or any other appropriate authorities. Further, the company has submitted to the Exchange details regarding the voting results (as per format prescribed under clause 35A of the Listing Agreement) and a copy of the Chairman's Speech delivered in the said Meeting.

announcements.headline: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.body: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange that The Board of Directors of the Company have decided that an Extraordinary General Meeting of the Company be convened on June 27, 2013 to seek approval of the shareholders for the Modified Draft Rehabilitation Scheme incorporating Amalgamation between Bharat Heavy Plate & Vessels Limited, the wholly owned subsidiary of Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited ( BHEL ) and BHEL.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange that in continuation to announcement dated 02.09.2013 regarding merger of Bharat Heavy Plate & Vessels Limited (BHPV) with Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL), it is informed that consequent upon the merger, the BHPV plant is renamed as Heavy Plates & Vessels Plant (HPVP) and designated as the 17th Manufacturing Unit of BHEL located at Vishakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh.

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange that Board for Industrial & Financial Reconstruction (BIFR) had sanctioned the Modified Scheme envisaging merger of Bharat Heavy Plate & Vessels Ltd (BHPV) with BHEL vide their order dated 29.08.2013 which was filed with respective Registrar of Companies (RoC) at Hyderabad and at Delhi on 30.08.2013 on which date the merger became effective. Now, on 02.08.2014, BHEL has received certified copy of order of Appellate Authority for Industrial & Financial Reconstruction (AAIFR) on appeals of BHPV Officers Association, BHPV U/V Series (Ex-Trainee) and BHPV Retired & VR Employees Welfare Society setting aside the BIFR order and remanding the matter back to BIFR with certain directions. BHEL is in the process of examining the AAIFR order for most appropriate action in the matter.

announcements.headline: Other Restructuring
announcements.body: Revised declaration regarding Dissolution of Joint Venture Company

announcements.headline: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.body: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board for Industrial and  Financial Reconstruction (BIFR) vide order dated 29th August, 2013 sanctioned the Modified Draft Rehabilitation Scheme envisaging merger of Bharat Heavy Plate and Vessels Limited (BHPV) with Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited (BHEL).

announcements.headline: Other Restructuring
announcements.body: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange about Other Restructuring
